Condition Report:
The bag is in pristine, 99% new condition. It is an essentially unused piece kept in excellent original shape with no noticeable signs of wear. Please review all photos carefully before purchasing.

Style Notes:
Praised as the ultimate luxury commuter bag, this Garden Party 30 offers a premium, minimalist aesthetic in a highly sought-after classic black and silver colorway. It is a timeless investment piece for the modern wardrobe. Highly versatile, it can be easily personalized with chains, bag charms, or Twillys to effortlessly switch up your everyday look.
